case_title: CACH, LLC VS. DAO T NGUYEN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-03-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF VENUE; DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REDUCED FILING FEE; FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DAO T DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-03-2014
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE DAO Y NGUYEN FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-03-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
